name: ATProto London • Bluesky social events in London, UK
description:
Building the next generation of social apps together in London, UK.

Bimonthly meetup for Bluesky users and devs.

Organised by @aendra.com, @davenash.com and @alice.mosphere.at at Newspeak House in Bethnal Green E1.

https://events.atproto.london
